title: guajava australis
intro: Guajava australis, also known as the Australian guava or strawberry guava, is a small tree or shrub native to Australia and New Caledonia, belonging to the family Myrtaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Guajava australis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Guajava australis can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
